titleStmt.title: SII 22.11: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 11. (A.R. No. 11 of 1906) SALEM DISTRICT, NAMAKKAL TALUK, NĀMAKKAL. NARASIMHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-IN THE UNDERGROUND CELLAR NEAR THE ENTRANCE INTO THE CENTRAL SHRINE.

summary.p: This consists of a number of disconnected fragments probably forming parts of more than one inscription which are built over in several places. One of the pieces seems to mention the 9th year of Rājarāja and to record some gift of land (?) for worship and repairs (in the temple). Another makes mention of a person by name Viḍukādaṉ alias Vattarāyaṉ of [Miṉ]ṉāmoḻi-nāḍu (?) and one Vaṇigachakravarti of Pavitramāṇikkam. A third piece records a gift of land to god Emberumāṉ Śiṅgapperumāḷ of Tiruvāraikkal by a private individual by name Kāśyapaṉ Śendāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ. Still another piece refers to the [2]2nd year of an unspecified king and to a gift of tax-free land to the temple as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—rāja—
—ranāṭ—
—vankuṭṭa—
—ṉaṉ Eṉṉu—
—mikku meṟ—
—kum vetanā—
—ppuṟamāka viṭ—
—ṉṟu koluk—
—ṭṭikkuṭutte—
—āṇṭāṉeṉ—
—eḻaccam Oḻiyāmal—
—l tāṉattārkkum Ik—
—ūr Irāja nampi tiruva—
—kuṟicci rāyasam muṉṉaiyā—
—ippaṭikku kallilum ve—
—var vācal Aṭiilum—
—tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi—

—ṭṭu viniyokameṉṟu taṇṭuvaṉa Irāja I—
—ṟku 1vatu mutal Iṉṉāyaṉmāṟku tiruvārāta—
—ttukkum tiruppaṇikku muṭalākat kuṭutto—
—vom 9vatu mutal puṟakkaṭamai nāṭṭuvini—
—vvaruvaṉa I vatu Ippaṭikku vi—
—ttarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cakkaravatti—
—ṭikku vaṇika cakkaravatti Eḻuttu Ippaṭi—
—tākkaḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku vi—
—tira cilaiya ceṭṭi Eḻuttu—
—keyaṉ Eḻuttu

—maṅkalattu kāśyapaṉ centāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ ciṅkapperumāḷāṉa ci puli—
—tiruvāraikkal Emperumāṉ ciṅkapperumāḷukkut tiruvi�—
—māka viṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr kuḷakkiḻ tittavatikku viraiyāccilai—
—vaṭakku Iṉṉālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu Uṭaipporu cekarikku nilaṅkā—

—ṉā moḻi nāṭṭu viṭukātanāṉa vattarāyaṉ miṉṉāmoḻi—
—vicaiyapālaṉum pavittiramāṇikkattu vaṇikacakkaravattiyum—

—cilaiyaceṭṭiyum Irācarācaccilaiyaceṭṭiyum Emūril cakkaravatti—
—m centamaṅkalattu teci mātākkaḷum tāmparakuṟicciyil muta—

—cāntap pulappaṉum maṇattiṭalil veḷḷāḷaril mola—
—yum kāṭṭu virappiḷḷāṇṭāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa nāṭṭavaro—
—tiruvāraikkal nāyaṉmār koyil tāṉattāṟku—

—nila muntirikaikkum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaikkum Eccoṟṟukkum ve—
—maviyāṟku kuṭuttu Iṟai Iḻicci tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka viṭṭukkuṭut—
—ṇṭarikanampiyeṉ tirukkarattil kala Arici Amutu—

—ippaṭikku—
—vaṇikan vica—
—kkuttum paṅku—
—cantaṉ cāntaṉ—
—ṉmaikkum Ippa—
—ṭṭuvan kaṅkan mu—
—eṉṉeḻuttu
—śrīmāye —

—tiruvi—
—rathakāra—
—vetānāyaka—
—ḷukaikku—
—llavāṭiṉa—
—kaiyāleo—
—aiñcāvatu muta—
—yili tiruviṭai—
—puṉcey nāṉ—
—kāṇiyum Inta—
—kaṭṭi tirunāḷum—
—ippaṭi cantirāti—
—ṭṭikkoḷvate—
—karāyaṉ Eḻuttu sva—
—raikal nāyaṉmār tirumu—
—tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāy varu—
—22vatu kārmutal pullu—
—lam Orumāvaraiyum koṇ—
—liyāka viṭṭom Innilam—
—te Innila miraṇṭu mā canti—
Digital edition of SII 22.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
